biological_replicate: seeds of the germplasm line of common bean (P. vulgaris L., Fabaceae) SMARC1N-PN1 were harvested from the field in London, Canada.
technical_replicate: the resulting peptides were analyzed by peptide mass fingerprinting using MALDI-MS.
experimental_design: Resistance to Pepsin Digestion and Resistance to Chymotrypsin Digestion
factor_value: Resistance to Pepsin Digestion and Resistance to Chymotrypsin Digestion
